Child 4 AC1, AC2, AC3"},{"parent_ac":"4. `TestIntake_TooLargeDecomposed_CreatesChildrenAndClosesParent` proves pre-claim decomposition creates children, closes the parent, records `triage-decomposed`, and leaves the children in `ReadyExecution` when they have no explicit deps.","coverage":"Child 3 AC4"},{"parent_ac":"5. `TestPostAttemptTooLargeNoChanges_ClosesParentAndLeavesChildrenReady` proves post-attempt orchestrator decomposition closes the parent and does not block generated children through the `Parent` field.","coverage":"Child 3 AC5"},{"parent_ac":"6. `TestPostLadderExhaustion_TriggersDecompose_ReviewTooLarge_ClosesParent` proves the post-ladder decomposer path closes the parent and records `decompose-applied` with child IDs.","coverage":"Child 3 AC6"},{"parent_ac":"7. `TestAutoDecomposeEpic_HappyPathClosesParent` or equivalent proves the auto-epic-decompose path closes the parent and still emits `auto_decompose_attempted` evidence.","coverage":"Child 4 AC5"},{"parent_ac":"8. Existing back-edge coverage remains or is extended: `TestDecomposeDoesNotSelfDep` (or equivalent) asserts every generated child excludes the parent ID from `DepIDs()`, and `ddx bead doctor` parent/ancestor dep tests still pass if present.","coverage":"Child 2 AC6; Child 3 AC3, AC7, AC8; Child 4 AC4, AC6, AC7"},{"parent_ac":"9. `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/agent/... ./internal/bead/... -run 'TooLargeDecomposed|DecomposeDoesNotSelfDep|PostAttemptTooLargeNoChanges|PostLadderExhaustion_TriggersDecompose|AutoDecomposeEpic|parent_ancestor_in_deps' -count=1` passes.","coverage":"Child 3 AC8 covers TooLargeDecomposed, DecomposeDoesNotSelfDep, PostAttemptTooLargeNoChanges, PostLadderExhaustion_TriggersDecompose, parent_ancestor_in_deps; Child 4 AC7 covers AutoDecomposeEpic, DecomposeDoesNotSelfDep, parent_ancestor_in_deps; Child 1 AC5 and Child 2 AC6 cover their added named Test* symbols plus inherited invariant slices."},{"parent_ac":"10. `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/agent/... ./internal/bead/... ./cmd/... -count=1` passes.","coverage":"Child 1 AC6; Child 2 AC7; Child 3 AC9; Child 4 AC8"},{"parent_ac":"11. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.","coverage":"Child 1 AC7; Child 2 AC8; Child 3 AC10; Child 4 AC9"}],"child_ids":["ddx-4dd8458f","ddx-903d8953","ddx-02160ce4","ddx-47407f72"],"rationale":"Split into four independently executable slices by ownership surface: governed documentation contract, agent-facing prompt/instruction contract, core pre-claim/recovery runtime lifecycle, and auto-epic runtime lifecycle. Each child preserves the original non-scope, parent ddx-2a1ece2b, related ddx-130cf9ab context, FEAT-010/TD-031 references, and verification gates while avoiding a dependency on the decomposed parent or on another child bead."}
